_comment: uapmd integration catalog. Downloads the uapmd-app APK (embeds the uapmd engine + AAP host + automation entrypoint) and the MDA plugin, both from GitHub Actions artifacts by commit. PREREQUISITES: (1) uapmd's android.yml is workflow_dispatch-only and builds against a chosen aap-core ref — dispatch it against an aap-core commit that has the current js-controller, then pin the uapmd commit below; (2) a PAT secret with artifact-read access to all source repos.
name: uapmd-ci

entries._note: uapmd commit whose android.yml run produced uapmd-android-apk. NOTE: this build predates the current aap-core; if AAP protocol drift breaks hosting the (newer) MDA plugin, re-dispatch uapmd android.yml against current aap-core and re-pin.
